title: net/http Transport Ownership, Redirects, Bodies, and Timeouts · Go Semantics Case: Checkredirect Policy
summary: Every request creates a Client, redirects escape policy, response bodies leak on errors, Client.Timeout hides phase causes, and ReadAll ignores size. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go checkredirect policy increment in owned bounded net/http retrieval adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed…
